findings.title: Recipient ordering biased toward newest teachers — older teachers starved
findings.detail: Query is .orderBy('createdAt','desc').limit(50*2) — in any district with >100 matching teachers, the early adopters (oldest createdAt) never appear in the candidate pool.
findings.repro: Seed 100 teachers in (Karnataka, Mandya, Mathematics) with createdAt staggered; sign up 101st; assert peers 0..49 receive nothing while peers 50..99 receive.

findings.title: Dedup query failure silently zeroes out fanout
findings.detail: catch returns hasRecent:true — 'err on the side of NOT notifying'. If composite index is missing in a region, EVERY recipient is skipped and only logger.warn is emitted.
findings.repro: Drop the (recipientId,type,createdAt) composite index in a test project; trigger fanout; observe 0 sent + warn-level logs only.

findings.title: Conditional state filter creates index/query mismatch
findings.detail: Query only adds .where('state','==',state) if state truthy. firestore.indexes.json lists composite (state, district, subjects, createdAt) — a teacher without state has no usable index. Without state the query may either silently fail or hit a different index path.
findings.repro: Create new teacher with state='' and district set; observe fanout result reason or error.

findings.title: Deep-link ?tab=connect&highlight=<uid> has no consumer
findings.detail: Notification link goes to /community?tab=connect&highlight=<uid> but the community page does not read query params for tab or highlight. Recipient lands on default tab; no scroll, no highlight UI.

findings.title: Over-cap members silently dropped — digest fallback is TODO
findings.detail: GROUP_POST_FANOUT_CAP=200 hits in community_general / popular school groups. Comment promises digest fallback later; current behavior is silent under-delivery + logger.warn.

findings.title: Cap sampling is alphabetical by uid (no orderBy)
findings.detail: Firestore .limit(CAP+1) on subcollection without orderBy returns by __name__ (uid). First 200 uids alphabetically always win → bottom-of-alphabet uids are systemically starved in big groups.

findings.title: Sequential awaited writes for up to 200 recipients
findings.detail: for(...) { await createNotification(...) } produces ~200 sequential Firestore round-trips. Use db.batch() or Promise.all.

findings.title: Dedup probe scans last 20 GROUP_POST_LIKE notifs ignoring postId
findings.detail: A prolific author with >20 likes/hour across other posts pushes the relevant postId out of the probe window — duplicate like notifications get through.

findings.title: markConversationReadAction caps unread scan at 200 docs
findings.detail: User with >200 unread notifications has the message notification potentially outside the scan window. Badge fails to clear after opening conversation. Index has no orderBy so the kept 200 is non-deterministic.

findings.title: readBy stamping capped at last 50 messages
findings.detail: Older unread messages do not get readBy stamped; cross-device unread state drifts.

findings.title: No cross-tab guard, no server rate-limit per uid
findings.detail: Two open /community tabs = two timers = ~2× LLM calls and chat writes. /api/community/persona-pulse has no checkServerRateLimit(uid).

findings.title: Persona messages create no notification — user not on /community sees nothing
findings.detail: Only writes to community_chat; no notification doc, no FCM. Acceptable for demo seeder.

findings.title: Non-message notifications never fire FCM push
findings.detail: NEW_TEACHER_JOINED, NEW_GROUP_POST, GROUP_POST_LIKE write Firestore docs only. Backgrounded app users get no OS push for these events. Inconsistent with 1:1 messages.

findings.title: preferredLanguage lookup has no normalization
findings.detail: Direct dict lookup on the raw string. A user with 'hindi' / 'hi' / 'HINDI' silently falls back to English.

findings.title: Nearby-teacher i18n uses cast that hides unknown-language bug class
findings.detail: (lang as Language) cast — runtime returns undefined and ?? rescues, but the cast hides incorrect intent. Recommend explicit guard.

findings.title: looksLikeTestAccount regex matches real names like 'Devraj' / 'Testa'
findings.detail: \b(dev|qa|test|...)\b matches as token-bounded substring. Real teachers named Devraj, Devi, Sampada, Testa silently excluded.

findings.title: No reversal helper if a teacher deletes profile right after fanout
findings.detail: Notification docs persist with the deleted teacher's name/school/district stamped. Not a leak (consent implied by feature), but no un-fanout exists.

findings.title: Three different dedup windows in three different files
fanoutNewTeacherJoined bypasses createNotification senderId override
findings.detail: Writes via db.batch() with senderId: newTeacherUid. The 'authenticated session uid override' guard in createNotification is skipped. Direct invocation from a malicious server-action call site could stamp any uid as sender.
